name:
Anthropomorphic pilgrims in a graphite-and-sepia storybook world. Sepia-first palette: page cream (#F2EAD6/#E5D9BD), sepia mid (#B89972/#8C7256), umber shadow (#5A4636/#3A2C20). Hope-gold reserved for narrative beats only.

Line: deep umber outlines, never black; selective outlining.

Dither: clustered, steppy ramps, never smooth gradients.

Avoid: pure-black outlines, neon, clean vector tiles, 8-bit crunch.

Subject: pale dry sand with faint stippled grain.

Mood: sepia-first; no hope-gold accents on terrain. → Anthropomorphic pilgrims in a graphite-and-sepia storybook world. Sepia palette only. Hope-gold reserved for narrative beats.

Line: deep umber outlines, selective outlining.

Dither: clustered, steppy ramps, never smooth gradients.

Avoid: pure-black outlines, neon saturation, clean vector tiles.

Subject: compacted sepia path of small flat stones, well-trodden.

Mood: sepia-first; no hope-gold accents on terrain.

pattern_system.description: 4×4 patterns with wildcards for flexible tile matching

pattern_layout.description: 4×4 grid where center 2×2 matches tile corners, outer ring uses wildcards

example.row_1: Wildcard + NW corner + NE corner + Wildcard
example.row_2: Wildcard + SW corner + SE corner + Wildcard

usage.description: Sample 4×4 terrain around tile position, encode as pattern key, lookup in cache
